case_title: JANNETTE LANCASTER VS. LILI KNIT CREATIONS et al

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LANCASTER, JANNETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LILI KNIT CREATIONS CARRIZALES, CARMEN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED NO EXHIBITS FILED
